CVE-2009-4495.title: Yaws 1.85 writes data to a log file without sanitizing non-printa ...
CVE-2009-4495.description: Yaws 1.85 writes data to a log file without sanitizing non-printable characters, which might allow remote attackers to modify a window's title, or possibly execute arbitrary commands or overwrite files, via an HTTP request containing an escape sequence for a terminal emulator.

CVE-2020-12872.title: yaws_config.erl in Yaws through 2.0.2 and/or 2.0.7 loads obsolete ...
CVE-2020-12872.description: yaws_config.erl in Yaws through 2.0.2 and/or 2.0.7 loads obsolete TLS ciphers, as demonstrated by ones that allow Sweet32 attacks, if running on an Erlang/OTP virtual machine with a version less than 21.0.

CVE-2020-24379.title: WebDAV implementation in Yaws web server versions 1.81 to 2.0.7 i ...
CVE-2020-24379.description: WebDAV implementation in Yaws web server versions 1.81 to 2.0.7 is vulnerable to XXE injection.

CVE-2020-24916.title: CGI implementation in Yaws web server versions 1.81 to 2.0.7 is v ...
CVE-2020-24916.description: CGI implementation in Yaws web server versions 1.81 to 2.0.7 is vulnerable to OS command injection.
